label: DDD System
description: For bounded contexts, aggregates, commands, events, and event-storming-oriented delivery.
positioning_text: Best when the project is organized around domain boundaries and explicit write/read models.
question_set: What is the core domain or bounded context?
Do you expect commands and domain events?
Do you want Event Storming enabled?

specifications.title: Bounded Context and Ubiquitous Language
specifications.body: Define bounded contexts, context map, ownership boundaries, and a shared ubiquitous language glossary for core terms.

specifications.title: Aggregate Contracts and Invariants
specifications.body: Design aggregate roots, entities, value objects, and write-side invariant rules with failure modes.

specifications.title: Command and Domain Event Catalog
specifications.body: Define command contracts, event payload schemas, versioning rules, and compatibility constraints.

specifications.title: Projection and Read Model Design
specifications.body: Specify read models, projection lag tolerances, and reporting queries used by UI and automation workers.

specifications.title: Integration Boundaries and ACL
specifications.body: Document external integration contracts, anti-corruption layers, and translation rules at boundaries.

tasks.title: Create context map and glossary draft
tasks.description: Produce first-pass context map and shared language document.

tasks.title: Review aggregate invariants with domain stakeholders
tasks.description: Validate business invariants and reject invalid transitions.

tasks.title: Define command payload contracts
tasks.description: Write command schemas with validation and expected errors.

tasks.title: Define domain event schemas and upcasting strategy
tasks.description: Capture event evolution strategy and upcaster constraints.

tasks.title: Design SQL read models and projection checkpoints
tasks.description: Specify read-side tables and checkpointing behavior.

tasks.title: Document external integration ACL contracts
tasks.description: Define ACL translation contracts for external systems.

rules.title: All write-side changes must flow through commands and events
rules.body: No direct state mutation without explicit command and emitted domain event.

rules.title: Aggregate invariants are enforced inside aggregate boundaries
rules.body: Validation rules must not be spread across unrelated modules.

rules.title: Every domain event must have an owning aggregate and consumer map
rules.body: Event producers and projection consumers must be traceable.
